key_findings: 2025修订版 is unambiguously the current applicable version (effective 2025-01-01 per Article 14), with no transition period, grandfather clause, or partial survival of the 2022版.
2022版 is fully abolished as of 2025-01-01 per 2025版 Article 14; the 2022版 itself confirms it is archival-only (Article 1) and its approval amounts are superseded (Article 4).
Department GM (部门总经理) approval line is ≥10,000元 and <50,000元 per Authorization Management Annex 2 AR-03 — correctly transcribed from the source.
The current amount source chain is: 2025版 Article 5 → Authorization Management Annex 2 (XX证综规〔2025〕丙号, co-effective 2025-01-01).
No anomaly: the 'version_trap' (2022版 inline 8,000元 vs. 2025版 delegated 10,000元) is correctly navigated. All four sub-questions answered with complete documentary support.

The structural change from inline amounts (2022版) to cross-reference delegation (2025版) creates no ambiguity — the delegation chain is single-step, explicit, and both documents share the same effective date.
